name: get_stock_data
description: Fetch current stock market data for a given ticker symbol including price, 52-week high/low, market cap, sector, industry, dividend yield, PE ratio, and beta.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL).

name: validate_ticker
description: Validate whether a stock ticker symbol is valid and return the associated company name and exchange.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol to validate.
